visual_description: A man wearing a white baseball cap looks down at his phone while standing in a bustling night market. The camera then shows a close-up of the phone screen with Chinese characters, followed by a digital map displaying coordinates and route lines. A second man in a brown jacket and glasses stands at a stall, also looking at his phone.
audio_description: Ambient market sounds and faint electronic beeps are audible.
